title: Warrant Search Latency
subtitle: Warrant lookups exceed SLA at peak traffic
objective: Optimize query architecture for fast reads while preserving consistent writes.

concepts.title: Read Optimization
concepts.description: Add cache for frequent warrant lookups.

concepts.title: Controlled Entry
concepts.description: Distribute search traffic via load balancer.

concepts.title: Transactional Store
concepts.description: Persist writes in a durable database.
